message:
feat: use marked + marked-terminal for rich TUI markdown rendering

Replace hand-rolled formatMarkdown/formatInline with marked/marked-terminal
directly (ink-markdown has a CJS/ESM incompatibility with ink v5+).
Gets us headers, syntax-highlighted code blocks, lists, tables, links.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
